items.title: Enjoy feathered visitors up close with Birdfy’s smart feeders, houses, more at up to 36% off starting from $85
items.summary:
As part of the Big Spring Sale event, you can find a bunch of Birdfy smart bird feeders, bird houses, and more getting up to 36% discounts right now to enjoy the feathered visitors in your yard in the warmer months ahead. One solid option for longer-term stays is Birdfy’s Nest Polygon Smart Bird House with Camera down at $169.99 shipped. Down from its $260 full price, we’ve only seen it down at $220 in 2026, with this low rate having last appeared through December Christmas sales. Now, for the first time in the new year, and just in time for feathered arrivals, you can score it with a $90 markdown that lands it back at the all-time lowest tracked price. You can find the full lineup of deals in the official Amazon storefront here, as well as our favorite picks below.
